body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #1439

/assign jmencak

labels.name: lifecycle/rotten
labels.description: Denotes an issue or PR that has aged beyond stale and will be auto-closed.

labels.name: lgtm
labels.description: Indicates that a PR is ready to be merged.

labels.name: approved
labels.description: Indicates a PR has been approved by an approver from all required OWNERS files.

labels.name: backport-risk-assessed
labels.description: Indicates a PR to a release branch has been evaluated and considered safe to accept.

labels.name: jira/severity-moderate
labels.description: Referenced Jira bug's severity is moderate for the branch this PR is targeting.

labels.name: jira/valid-bug
labels.description: Indicates that a referenced Jira bug is valid for the branch this PR is targeting.

labels.name: jira/valid-reference
labels.description: Indicates that this PR references a valid Jira ticket of any type.

labels.name: verified
labels.description: Signifies that the PR passed pre-merge verification criteria

title: [release-4.20] OCPBUGS-66364: Add support for lscpu_check TuneD built-in
